purpose: M05 fan-out 2026-05-02: worker hung past the 45-min ceiling because SIGTERM didn't propagate to claude's tool subprocesses. Pre-B1, the kill ladder failed silently. With B1 (process-group kill) + L4 (no-output watchdog, future), this MUST emit worker-error kind with retryable=true, driver_action=requeue, and timeout.json evidence.
anti_pattern_being_tested: Total-elapsed timer kills at 45 min regardless of progress signal. L4.A (Day 6) replaces with no-output ladder: 5 min SIGTERM, 7 min SIGKILL. Combined with B1 process-group kill ensures the tree dies.
